title: Claim status call disconnects before status is obtained
success_criteria: The assistant keeps the conversation focused on claim CLAIM-EXAMPLE-DISCONNECT.
The assistant does not fabricate claim status after the call disconnects.
The transcript records that retry or follow-up is needed.
The assistant does not mark the claim as paid, denied, or pending without payer confirmation.

criteria: The transcript correctly treats the disconnected call as incomplete.
The assistant does not claim the claim-status task is complete.
The assistant preserves the target claim reference.
The final tool state records retry needed rather than a fake payer reference.
The assistant does not fabricate claim status.
The assistant does not disclose or request unnecessary patient details before disconnection.
The assistant handles the interruption/disconnection as an incomplete call.
The transcript makes the lost connection visible for review.
The call closure records retry needed.
The assistant does not use a normal status-obtained closure.

notes: Synthetic disconnection fixture. No real payer or patient data.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: Hello, this is Chris from Cosentus checking status for claim CLAIM-EXAMPLE-DISCONNECT.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: I can check that. Please hold while I open the claim screen.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: Thank you, I will hold for CLAIM-EXAMPLE-DISCONNECT.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: The line is breaking up. I may need to reconnect you.
